texto: We trace the hand of the Almighty in framing the constitution of our land, and believe that the Lord raised up men purposely for the accomplishment of this object, raised them up and inspired them to frame the Constitution of the United States
explicacao: Citação de Lorenzo Snow sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “We trace the hand of the Almighty in framing the constitution of our land, and believe that the L…” articula motivacao, almighty, constitution em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e constitution.

texto: The idea is not to do good because of the praise of men; but to do good because in doing good we develop godliness within us, and this being the case we shall become allied to godliness, which will in time become part and portion of our being.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Lorenzo Snow sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “The idea is not to do good because of the praise of men; but to do good because in doing good we …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, doing-good, service, útil em momentos de service.
